channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-29
item.description:
Our community has seen significant progress across multiple projects recently. The regcheck project has made notable advancements, including improvements to report text normalization, quote pop-ups, and multi-study extractions, as well as updates to the command-line interface. Meanwhile, the escicheck project has been synced with the latest version of effectcheck, ensuring it stays up-to-date with the latest developments. Additionally, the auto-zcurve and output-it-forward projects have seen updates, with revisions to the validation note and citation in auto-zcurve, and the addition of a Chrome Webstore link for output-it-forward, making it easier for users to access the extension. These connections between projects demonstrate the collaborative spirit of our community, and we celebrate the progress being made towards advancing open-source research tools.

31 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: escicheck

Most active:

regcheck15 commits
metacheck10 commits
docpluck4 commits
escicheck2 commits

item.title: regcheck: 8 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

The staging branch was the focus of the recent work, with multiple commits made to it. The work included "hardening multi-study extractions", as well as updating the ".gitignore" file. Additionally, the report text normalisation was "improve[d]", and fixes were made to "quote pop-ups" and "quote chunking and UI output" was updated. The report render was also updated, and "embeddings experimentation" was conducted. Furthermore, changes were made based on "Matilda suggestions", and "finishing touches" were added to the "multistudy cli".

8 commit(s) today:

  • ae1de84 [staging] hardening multi-study extractions — Jamie Cummins
  • 2516dd5 [staging] Update .gitignore — Jamie Cummins
  • d1ee701 [staging] improve report text normalisation — Jamie Cummins
  • fc0bb51 [staging] fix quote pop-ups — Jamie Cummins
  • a8b610a [staging] update quote chunking and UI output — Jamie Cummins
  • c920500 [staging] embeddings experimentation — Jamie Cummins
  • d5e2697 [staging] update report render — Jamie Cummins
  • e3f869b [staging] improvements based on Matilda suggestions — Jamie Cummins
  • c682ed0 [staging] add finishing touches on multistudy cli — Jamie Cummins
  • fdfb805 [staging] improve local reporting — Jamie Cummins
  • 31fa103 [staging] improve multistudy ingestion — Jamie Cummins
  • b0d8ab2 [staging] debug of CLI report — Jamie Cummins
  • 97e8203 [staging] add further local LLM support in CLI — Jamie Cummins
  • df873ec [staging] UI fixes — Jamie Cummins
  • 5b53ad6 [staging] fix OSF + mutlistudy bugs — Jamie Cummins
  • 71be3be [staging] harden security features — Jamie Cummins
  • fbd5030 [staging] firm up qwen formatting — Jamie Cummins
  • f775856 [staging] improve qwen — Jamie Cummins
  • 724d020 [staging] re-add qwen! — Jamie Cummins
  • 89a1470 [staging] push for redeploy — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →

item.title: escicheck: 1 commit today
item.description:
giladfeldman/escicheck

The `main` branch was updated with a commit that synchronized it with `escicheckapp@57a791d`, which corresponds to `effectcheck` version 0.6.7, as indicated by the commit message "sync from escicheckapp@57a791d (effectcheck v0.6.7)". No other branches were worked on in this set of commits. This commit, referenced as (#21), brought the `main` branch in line with the specified version of `effectcheck`. The specific changes made by this synchronization are not detailed in the commit message, but it implies that the `main` branch now matches the state of `escicheckapp` at the specified commit hash. The commit message does not mention any other branches or changes beyond this synchronization.

1 commit(s) today:

  • a154bdb [main] sync from escicheckapp@57a791d (effectcheck v0.6.7) (#21) — Gilad Feldman
  • 244b2d8 [main] sync from escicheckapp@f37b5a1 (effectcheck v0.6.6) (#20) — Gilad Feldman
  • a588210 [main] sync from escicheckapp@bd6f007 (effectcheck v0.6.5) (#19) — Gilad Feldman
  • 1d48c4e [main] sync from escicheckapp@dec37b1 (effectcheck v0.6.4) (#18) — Gilad Feldman
  • 4be3331 [main] sync from escicheckapp@f52d7ce (effectcheck v0.6.3) (#17) — Gilad Feldman

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
